schematic_variants: C (163 pages) + S (159 pages). J416-C = MLB-C, J416-S = MLB-S.
template: A2442 (Pro/Max structure with dual PMU, Viper VR, Monaco VR)
pro_max_variants: BOM options for Pro vs Max configurations. Max has additional GPU power phases via Monaco VR.
key_differences_from_a2442: M2 Pro/Max instead of M1 Pro/Max — same power topology, updated silicon
16-inch display vs 14-inch (A2442) — larger backlight, potentially higher current
3 USB-C ports (ATC0, ATC1 left; ATC2 right)
Viper VR for high-current SoC domains

sections.note: Page layout follows A2442 Pro/Max structure. Section numbers may vary slightly between C and S variants. Refer to A2442 metadata for detailed section mapping.
